formula: QAMU = estimatedTokens1mo × (WMQ / 100); score = QAMU × efficiencyMultiplier / price → 0–100

efficiency.source: Artificial Analysis cost-per-task (USD to run its standardized agentic task)
efficiency.reference: self-calibrating median cost-per-task across models with data
efficiency.note: Median model → 1.0×. Multiplier is exactly 1.0 (no-op) when a model has no cost-per-task data.
